The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Foetid Chapel

Cameras track with eerie persistence.
Corners hide watchful presences.
Whispers of roused Old Ones.
R'lyeh artifacts plague source.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • Sieh die Situation so, wie sie ist, nicht wie du sie erwartest.
  • I came From 1 down
  • This entire floor is a bait, go up.
  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUNWSWSSESWWWWSSEES
  • guys i stumbled my way up the stairs and i think broke my leg can someone call for an ambulance (im european dw)
  • South deadend
  • EAST. dont go up or down
  • these stairs omg i'm gonna cum
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • The exit is past a lot of RUGOSE rooms
  • Лифт не работает
